word: H7091 - קִפֹּוז - qippôwz - kip-poze' - Great owl

sections.paragraph:
Original: קפּוז

Transliteration: qippôz

Phonetic: kip-poze'

BDB Definition:

  1. arrow snake, owl
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: from an unused root meaning to contract, i.e. spring forward

TWOT entry: 2050a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
